title: Up to You
original_title: 私の奴隷になりなさい 第3章 「おまえ次第」
overview: There is a man who has many sex slaves. Another man offers his wife as a sex slave to him and the slave owner agrees. He adds the man's wife to his stable. Alas, the husband comes to reverse his decision and takes his wife back. The reversal of the arrangement causes trauma.
